statement.en: Mitochondrial biogenesis and pathway activation during follicular lymphoma transformation to diffuse large B-cell lymphoma
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is categorized as cs.AI but describes a biomedical thesis on lymphoma transformation with no abstract content available due to embargo. This represents an observation-impossible state: the actual scientific claim cannot be evaluated without access to the thesis body. The cs.AI categorization appears misplaced for a cell biology/oncology work.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 細胞のエネルギー産生が、ミトコンドリア数の爆発と代謝経路の解放によって、閾値を超えて急変する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 静寂な細胞から、らせん状のエネルギーが噴き出し、形態が拡大し、変異へと暴走する瞬間の映像。
